name: Wireframe Component
description: Structure of a UI component within a wireframe design file.

fields.name: type
fields.description: UI type: Button, Input, Navigation, Header, Footer, Card, Modal, Form, Table, etc.

fields.name: fidelity
fields.description: Level of detail: Low, Medium, High.

fields.name: annotations
fields.description: Design notes attached to the component.

fields.name: interactive
fields.description: Whether the component has prototype links.
